title: God of Gamblers Part III: Back to Shanghai
original_title: 賭俠 III 之上海灘賭聖
overview: While battling a psychic gambler, Sing hurtles back in time to 1937 Shanghai. Now he must come to grips with his family history and get back to 1991.
